data.title: FHLB Dallas and Community Bank of Mississippi award $150K grant to NMRLS for legal aid in North Mississippi.
data.description: In Tupelo, Mississippi, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Community Bank of Mississippi are coming together to present a $150,000 Pathway Fund grant to North Mississippi Rural Legal Services (NMRLS). This funding will support the expansion of affordable legal aid services. The grant aims to assist Northern Mississippi residents in resolving heirs' property concerns, including unclear or missing property titles, dealing with multiple heirs having fractional ownership, and overcoming other property-related challenges.

data.title: Warren Buffett avoided Tesla stock but Berkshire will power Tesla's Semis through a partnership with Tesla for Semi Chargers at various locations. Tesla stock trading high, partnership to boost Tesla Semi production. Buffett's Berkshire partners with Tesla to install Semi Chargers at travel centers, covering locations along I-5, I-10 and more, aiding Tesla Semi production volume.
data.description: Investment tycoon Warren Buffett has historically avoided investing in Tesla Inc (TSLA) stock, which contrasts with Berkshire Hathaway Inc's (BRK) investment strategy. Although Berkshire has not yet delved into Tesla stock, they may endorse the anticipated mass production of the Tesla Semi. TSLA stock is currently trading at heightened levels, prompting speculation on its future trajectory. In a strategic move, Berkshire subsidiary Pilot Travel Centers partnered with Tesla to deploy Semi Chargers at various sites nationwide, focusing on I-5, I-10, and other key routes. Tesla's tweet unveiled a map outlining potential charger locations in states like California, Georgia, Nevada, New Mexico, and Texas. The Semi Chargers are slated to commence operations in the near future. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CTIA adds Mariam Sorond as board member from NextNav - effective immediately - expanding leadership.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, CTIA, the association for the wireless industry, revealed that Mariam Sorond, CEO of NextNav, has been appointed to CTIA's Board of Directors. The announcement emphasizes Sorond's immediate inclusion in the board. CTIA expressed enthusiasm about having Sorond join the board.

data.title: FCPT buys GreatWater 360 Auto Care property in Minnesota for $2.3M via sale-leaseback deal. Corporate-operated under long term lease.
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), has acquired a GreatWater 360 Auto Care property for $2.3 million through sale-leaseback. The property, located in Minnesota's busy area, is under a long term, triple net lease and operated by the corporate. FCPT specializes in owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties.

data.title: Investigation launched into Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) over market failures. Stock down 15% with reduced revenue guidance.
data.description: Reed Kathrein, a partner, is closely reviewing the "high confidence" assurances made by ZBH after the company's stock experienced a 15% collapse and reduced revenue guidance. The investigation is being conducted by the national shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman regarding Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ZBH). This scrutiny follows significant market response, with the stock plummeting by 15% and the company revising its revenue guidance.

data.title: Innovaccer reveals AI platforms addressing healthcare challenges at Xccelerate 2026, focusing on rising demand, constrained workforce, and increasing complexity.
data.description: In San Francisco, Innovaccer, a prominent healthcare AI organization, recently completed Xccelerate 2026, its yearly customer and industry gathering. The event brought together healthcare executives, clinicians, policymakers, and technology experts to tackle a pressing issue in the industry: the need to address increasing demand for care amidst limited workforce availability, decreasing margins, and rising administrative intricacies. Over the course of two days, the conference featured discussions led by leaders from health systems, payers, and various stakeholders.

data.title: Rho and Stripe partner to help founders launch faster and scale smarter, corrections made on Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: Rho has recently announced a partnership with Stripe on 26th January 2026 to assist founders in accelerating their launch process and enhancing their scaling strategies. The collaboration aims to provide support to entrepreneurs for quicker establishment and smarter growth. Additional information regarding this partnership is available at the conclusion of the news release.

data.title: Solaris Energy Infrastructure to host earnings conference call on 2/25/2026; Q4 results due 2/24/2026 after market close.
data.description: Solaris Energy Infrastructure, Inc. (NYSE:SEI) will hold a conference call to review its financial performance for full year and fourth quarter 2025 on February 25, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET). The earnings release for the same period will be announced after market close on February 24, 2026. The conference call on full year and fourth quarter 2025 can be accessed by participants internally.

data.title: ADM settles SEC investigation into reporting of intersegment sales, agrees to pay $40 million; no admission of guilt.
data.description: Chicago-based ADM (NYSE: ADM) has reached a settlement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding an investigation into its past reporting of intersegment sales. The global leader in natural solutions will pay $40 million without admitting to any misconduct. The agreement also includes terms with the Department of Justice.

data.title: Sound Financial Bancorp, Inc. announces Q4 and full year 2025 results with increase in regular cash dividend.
data.description: Sound Financial Bancorp Inc. unveiled its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company reported a significant increase in profits with a total revenue of $X for the year. Additionally, there was a notable rise in net income, reaching $Y by the end of the year. As a reflection of their strong performance, Sound Financial Bancorp Inc. has decided to raise its regular cash dividend to Z amount to reward its shareholders. This move showcases the company's commitment to creating value for its investors and ensuring a sustainable financial future.

data.title: Churchill Capital Corp IX delays general meeting from February 3 to February 11, 2026, to vote on business combination with PlusAI.
data.description: Churchill Capital Corp IX, a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CCIX, has delayed its extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to vote on the proposed business merger with Plus Automation, Inc. The meeting, originally scheduled for February 3, 2026, will now take place on February 11, 2026. PlusAI, a renowned provider of AI software for self-driving trucks, is at the forefront of technological innovation in this sector. The decision to reschedule the meeting was made by Churchill IX's Board of Directors.
